title: Lost in Dreamland(迷失梦域国)
description: Add a series of new things.Including a new dimension.
body:
#                                            Dreamland(梦域之国)

    

This is a dream world where players can get by creating portals. It is said that in that dimension, one may truly be able to live as they please.（这是梦里的世界，玩家可以通过制作传送门到达那里。据说在那个维度中，也许真的能随心所欲的生活。）


##            What new features have been added to the mod?（mod里加了什么新东西？）

1. New biomes and new dimensions.（新的生物群系和新的维度。）
2. Add several new minerals and tools.(添加几种新的矿物和工具。)
3. New weapons.（新的武器。）
4. New mobs.(新的生物。)
5. New potion.(新的药水效果。)


##            How to get to that dimension?（如何去到那个维度？）

  You can reach it by making a portal, which construct a portal with a dreamland dirt frame.It can be activated through 'Dreamland Dew'.(你可以通过制作一个入口来到达它，这个入口用一个梦境泥土框架建造。它可以通过“宁静露水”激活。)

![Frame demonstration picture.（框架演示图。）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5624842e3f3aa4aa900b0efe1526c38cc82825d0_0.webp)

##    About the music.(关于mod内置音乐。)

[Music:sataro](https://m.bilibili.com/audio/au4613999)

[Music:jianxi music](https://m.bilibili.com/audio/au4614068)

[Music:Lost](https://m.bilibili.com/audio/au4614110)

## Regarding Compatibility.(关于兼容性。)

- As shown in the image demonstrated in the 'Gallery', this mod can run perfectly on the mobile Java version. However, I do not recommend using it with Optfine. In versions 1.1 and later, I will gradually add(update) Mobs models, and I am not sure if the formats of these models will work properly in Optfine Version.Including some mods that modify the model.(正如在“画廊”中演示的图片所示，本mod可以在手机java版本上完美运行。但是，我不建议与Optfine一起使用，在1.1往后的版本我会陆续加入生物模型，我不确定这些模型的格式在Optfine中能否正常运作。包括那些改动模型的mod。)

##                                      A partner who can be tamed.(可被驯化的伙伴)

Dreamland Guardians and Meng Li Chan can both be tamed. Dream guardians do not like to work for nothing, so they prefer the breath of magic as an exchange. Meng Li Chan likes dream dew.(梦境守卫者和小梦璃都是可以被驯化的。梦境守卫者不喜欢白干活，因此它们喜欢魔蕴之息作为交换。小梦璃喜欢宁静露水。)
